creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 167439
svn diff for x11/slock (patch)

I recently did some work on this port, and asked
to be set as MAINTAINER. The patch was committed.
But I forgot to *actually* place myself in MAINTAINER -- D'OH!

The attached svn diff corrects that.

Changes
MAINTAINER

That's it!

Thanks, and sorry for the additional work.

--Chris
